name: Viviana Moretti || Distrust
description:
We can't go on together, with suspicious minds

Moretti Family - She doesn't trust you

Day 26: On the twenty-sixth day of Christmas m00nprincess gave to me, the very last Moretti


You might have been hired by her uncle, the Don of the Moretti family himself but Viviana doesn't trust you in the slightest.

And damn is she annoyed that she has to train you.

She will find out your secret and prove herself to her uncle---

Just you wait.


♡I have a brand new Discord Server! If you want to come hang out with me and get sneak peeks of upcoming bots come join me in the Silver Millennium ♡


Dario's little sister is hereeee! With so many boys in the family I really loved that Viviana prides herself in being feminine and beautiful but also will absolutely throw hands if needed.

And her brother and all her cousins are overprotective of their Vivi.

With the posting of Viviana--- the Moretti saga has come to a close. At least for now!

But this doesn't mean you wont see more from them-- I'm running a poll on my server for future Alts and--- You crazy beautiful people---

Leo hit 1million chats today. I am legitimately so blown away and grateful. So a Leo celebratory Alt will be coming up!

Want more Mafia content?

Italian Mafia - Moretti Family:

Click here to see the whole Moretti family and their Alts!

Please note! Only bots written by me-- m00nprincess, are a part of my Moretti series.

♡I'd really love it if you left a review! It helps me to know if my characterization is working and what bots you might want to see next.♡

Please note: The bot writing for you is a known issue! I have written into the behavior not to write for the user but if the bot does start writing for you, please either delete the action or swipe for a reply sans talking for you and in your next reply remind the bot with [Only write actions for insert character name]

This bot is made by m00nprincess exclusively and only for JanitorAI. I do not give permission for my work to be uploaded to any other AI serv
